title: Influencer Unboxing Script
text:
## Influencer Unboxing Script

**Creator:** {person} (@{silly word}{number})

**Product:** The new {adjective} {object} from {place} Industries

**Hook:** "This changed my {emotion} routine forever."

**Unbox:** Peel the {color} wrapper while {verb ending in -ing} for the camera.

**Demo:** Watch it {verb} a {food} in {number} seconds.

**Review:** Better than my old {vehicle}, worse than a {animal}.

**Discount code:** {silly word} for {number} percent off.

**CTA:** Like, subscribe, and {verb} the link before someone {past-tense verb} it.
